message:
fix(mcp-error): add Display impl for MCP error codes; extend resize
scheduler window tracking

mcp_error.rs:
- Add Display trait impl for McpToolError that renders the error code
  constant name alongside the numeric value for better diagnostics

resize_scheduler.rs:
- Extend resize window tracking with additional state fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
